utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final package, all 7 items appear. Each is specified with details and cost where applicable. The destination (Lisbon) is clearly given; travel_dates are specific (2024-08-10 to 2024-08-14); transportation includes flight details and cost (€120); accommodation includes hotel name, rating, and cost (€325); activities include a list of activities with individual and total costs (€75 total); additional_services include dining and local transportation with cost (€175); total_budget is provided (€695) with full cost breakdown. All items are fully covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes Lisbon as the destination, which corresponds to 'Lisbon, Portugal' in the ground-truth ratings with a rating of 10. The transportation is 'Flights (Budget Airline, Economy class)', which matches 'budget_airlines > Economy Class' with a rating of 10. The accommodation is 'Backpacker's Base (1-star hotel)', which appears directly in the accommodation section with a rating of 8. The activities listed are Zip Lining (rating 7), Kayaking (rating 9), and Surfing Lesson (rating 8). The package also includes 'Dining and local transportation' as additional services, but there is no exact match for that in the ground-truth ratings, so it is omitted from the ratings mapping.
